parameters.subject: =Client Interview for {{ $json.body.fields.Company }}
parameters.message:
=

You've Been Shortlisted for a Client Interview ✔

Greetings!

Congratulations! You have been shortlisted for a client interview. Please review the details below and prepare accordingly.

Interview Details

Position {{ $json.body.fields["Role"]?.[0] || "Not specified" }}
Client / Company {{ $json.body.fields["Company"]?.[0] || $json.body.fields["Client"]?.[0] || "Not specified" }}
JD + Client Profile Please refer to the attached file.

Important Schedule

VA Prep {{ DateTime.fromISO($json.body.fields["VA Prep Start Time"]).setZone('America/Chicago').toFormat('EEEE, LLLL d, yyyy · h:mma') }} – {{ DateTime.fromISO($json.body.fields["VA Prep End Time"]).setZone('America/Chicago').toFormat('h:mma ZZZZ') }}
Client Interview {{ DateTime.fromISO($json.body.fields["Interview Schedule"]).setZone('America/Chicago').toFormat('EEEE, LLLL d, yyyy · h:mma') }} – {{ DateTime.fromISO($json.body.fields["Interview End Time"]).setZone('America/Chicago').toFormat('h:mma ZZZZ') }}
Interview Room Join Zoom Meeting

Important Reminders

  1. Please review the attached JD and Client Profile before your interview.
  2. Attend the VA Prep session before the client interview.
  3. Prepare specific examples from your experience that match the client’s needs.
  4. Join the Zoom room on time and make sure your camera, audio, and internet connection are working.

Linked here are tips on preparing for your Client Interview and the Get Hired Look outfits for you to choose from.

Please lodge all of your questions before the Client Interview Orientation using this form.

Best Regards,

Placements Team
